title: 2016 Legal Analysis of Washington State Bar Complaint: In re Patricia Fulton
content:
# 2016 Legal Analysis of Washington State Bar Complaint: In re Patricia Fulton

## Overview

Analysis of the Washington State Bar complaint filed against Patricia Fulton for professional misconduct and ineffective assistance of counsel.

## Allegations

### Rule Violations

- RPC 1.1 - Competence
- RPC 1.3 - Diligence
- RPC 1.4 - Communication
- RPC 1.7 - Conflict of Interest

### Specific Misconduct

- Failure to investigate case facts
- Failure to file timely motions
- Coercing client into guilty plea
- Misrepresenting case status
- Failure to communicate material information

## Bar Process

- Initial complaint filing
- Bar response and investigation
- Outcome and appeal rights

## Civil Implications

- Legal malpractice claim
- Sixth Amendment ineffective assistance
- Plea withdrawal motion basis
